description: Recreate the TradingCat harness scaffold for the research-page loading failure and record the current blockers before code changes.
steps: Keep a fresh `PLAN.json` with immutable descriptions/steps for this bugfix scope.
Keep `PROGRESS.md` append-only with restored session facts and current failures.
Commit the harness initialization checkpoint before implementation work starts.

description: Reproduce the empty or forever-loading `/dashboard/research` behavior against the current local runtime.
steps: Verify the page shell loads from `/dashboard/research`.
Confirm the page does not populate the expected research sections under current runtime conditions.
Record the observed behavior and request chain in `PROGRESS.md`.

description: Measure the current latency/failure characteristics of the research-page data endpoints.
steps: Time `/dashboard/summary`.
Time `POST /research/scorecard/run` and `POST /research/candidates/scorecard`.
Record which endpoints block the page and how long they take.

description: Reproduce the `/research/backtests` regression that currently fails init-time verification.
steps: Run the focused API test for `test_research_backtest_endpoints`.
Capture the exact response payload or serialization error.
Record the blocker as a must-fix baseline regression.

description: Lock the operator-facing contract for research-page hydration.
steps: Define that `/dashboard/research` must render useful data even when optional live research endpoints are slow.
Keep the page truthful about degraded or partial state instead of pretending everything is fresh.
Document the contract in `.harness/spec.md`.

description: Lock the fallback priority for research-page data sources.
steps: Prefer `/dashboard/summary` as the first paint source for strategy, candidate, and market-awareness sections.
Treat live scorecard and candidate-scorecard requests as enhancement layers instead of hard prerequisites.
Require section-level fallbacks when enhancement requests fail or time out.

description: Lock the UI expectation for partial-data rendering on the research page.
steps: Keep market-awareness visible when embedded summary data exists.
Keep active-strategy and candidate sections populated from summary snapshots when possible.
Show explicit degraded notes instead of blank panels.

description: Lock the scope boundary for this fix so it remains bug-focused.
steps: Do not redesign the whole research console.
Do not remove the live research endpoints; only decouple them from first paint.
Repair the backtests regression only as required baseline stabilization, not as a broader research refactor.

description: Initialize harness communication files for this new bugfix task.
steps: Create `.harness/spec.md` and `.harness/status.json`.
Keep `.harness/` ignored in git except forced-tracked state files when checkpointing.
Set the first active phase to planning.

description: Refactor research-page loading so `/dashboard/summary` is fetched and processed as the primary source.
steps: Keep the summary request on the critical path.
Separate summary resolution from slower enhancement requests.
Verify summary-backed sections can render before enhancement requests finish.

description: Decouple `POST /research/scorecard/run` from blocking first paint.
steps: Move the request out of the hard `Promise.all` dependency for initial hydration.
Allow the page to keep rendering when this request is slow or unavailable.
Verify the page still shows summary-derived strategy data without it.

description: Decouple `POST /research/candidates/scorecard` from blocking first paint.
steps: Move the request out of the hard `Promise.all` dependency for initial hydration.
Allow candidate sections to fall back to summary snapshot rows and counts.
Verify the page still renders usable candidate panels when this request stalls.

description: Render active strategy rows from dashboard summary immediately.
steps: Use `dashboard.strategies.rows` as the initial source.
Keep the row shape compatible with the existing active-strategy table renderer.
Verify the table is non-empty when summary data is present.

description: Render candidate counts from dashboard summary immediately.
steps: Use `dashboard.candidates` counts for initial overview metrics.
Keep the overview tiles meaningful before live candidate scorecard data returns.
Verify counts render without waiting for the candidate-scorecard endpoint.

description: Render top picks from dashboard summary immediately.
steps: Use `dashboard.candidates.top_candidates` as the first paint source.
Preserve existing card interactions and strategy-pick buttons.
Verify top-pick cards render from summary alone.

description: Preserve market-awareness rendering from embedded dashboard summary data.
steps: Continue preferring `details.market_awareness` when present.
Avoid any extra fetch when the embedded snapshot is already complete enough.
Verify the market-awareness panel still paints on first load.

description: Make the asset-correlation request non-blocking for overall page hydration.
steps: Allow the matrix to load independently from the first paint.
Keep the rest of the page usable even if asset-correlation data is delayed.
Verify the correlation section can stay empty without blanking the whole page.

description: Add soft-failure handling for the live scorecard enhancement request.
steps: Catch scorecard request failures or timeouts separately.
Keep previously rendered summary-backed content visible.
Provide a small degraded-state note rather than a page-wide error.

description: Add soft-failure handling for the live candidate-scorecard enhancement request.
steps: Catch candidate-scorecard request failures or timeouts separately.
Keep summary-backed candidate content visible.
Provide a degraded-state note or fallback bucket text.

description: Replace page-wide failure behavior with section-level degraded rendering where possible.
steps: Keep the global catch only for true summary failure.
Leave market-awareness, active strategies, and candidates visible when only enhancement calls fail.
Verify the page no longer looks blank under partial failure.

description: Keep refresh interactions compatible with progressive loading.
steps: Ensure the refresh button still reloads summary and enhancement layers.
Avoid resetting already rendered panels to blank unless the primary summary call fails.
Verify refresh preserves usable content under partial failure.

description: Keep strategy impact loading independent from scorecard enhancement success.
steps: Derive the default selected strategy from whichever candidate source is available.
Avoid crashing `loadStrategyImpact` when live candidate rows are missing.
Verify impact rendering can still boot from fallback candidate rows.

description: Avoid clearing prior successful state when a later enhancement refresh fails.
steps: Retain last-known-good rendered data in memory.
Do not overwrite summary-backed panels with empty placeholders on enhancement failure.
Verify a transient scorecard failure no longer blanks the page.

description: Keep verdict filtering compatible with fallback candidate rows.
steps: Ensure `filteredRows()` works with dashboard-summary candidate shapes.
Keep filter tabs operational when only fallback candidate data exists.
Verify tab switching still changes visible candidate rows.

description: Handle the no-candidate edge case gracefully under fallback mode.
steps: Avoid throwing when no candidate rows are available.
Leave the impact panel in a clear empty state.
Verify the page remains usable without candidates.

description: Keep export buttons and auto-refresh compatible with progressive hydration.
steps: Avoid binding logic that assumes every table is populated immediately.
Keep auto-refresh from repeatedly producing blank-first paints.
Verify export hooks still attach once the corresponding table exists.

description: Keep market-awareness fetches deduplicated under the new loading flow.
steps: Prefer embedded summary market-awareness data when available.
Only call the dedicated market-awareness endpoint as a fallback path.
Verify no redundant call is made on healthy summary loads.

description: Add a visible partial-data note for research-page degraded states.
steps: Surface when live research scorecards are unavailable but summary data is being shown.
Keep the note concise and operator-facing.
Verify the note only appears during degraded enhancement states.

description: Keep verdict-groups and reject-summary sections resilient to missing live candidate data.
steps: Show fallback empty states instead of hard failures.
Avoid assuming `verdict_groups` and `reject_summary` always exist.
Verify these sections no longer break page rendering under fallback mode.

description: Preserve the current research-page visual structure while changing data flow.
steps: Do not remove the new market-awareness panels.
Keep desktop and narrow-layout structure intact.
Verify the page shell remains unchanged apart from improved loading behavior.

description: Fix the `/research/backtests` NaN serialization regression at the source.
steps: Identify which experiment payload field emits `nan` or `inf`.
Normalize the field before FastAPI JSON serialization.
Verify `GET /research/backtests` returns `200` again.

description: Sanitize backtest experiment list payloads without weakening useful metrics.
steps: Replace non-JSON-compliant numeric sentinels with safe null/finite values.
Keep the rest of the experiment record intact.
Verify the experiment list remains readable and comparable.

description: Preserve backtest compare behavior after sanitization.
steps: Ensure compare endpoints still work when experiments contain formerly invalid metrics.
Keep `same_inputs`, `input_diff`, and `metric_diff` fields available.
Verify compare remains `200` for at least one pair when enough experiments exist.

description: Harden research serialization paths against future NaN leakage.
steps: Add or reuse a central sanitization helper if needed.
Apply it at the narrowest layer that protects API serialization.
Verify no new ad hoc NaN handling is scattered across unrelated routes.

description: Ensure dashboard-summary hydration remains fast enough for first paint.
steps: Avoid introducing new blocking recomputation into `/dashboard/summary`.
Continue reusing cached or snapshot-backed dashboard data where the repo expects it.
Verify summary still returns promptly during local smoke.

description: Preserve local-history-first and safe-mode behavior while fixing the page.
steps: Do not reintroduce live data hard dependencies into safe research flows.
Keep synthetic/local fallback semantics intact.
Verify research endpoints still tolerate unavailable OpenD/Futu state.

description: Extend static asset coverage for the new summary-first research loading flow.
steps: Assert the research JS references dashboard summary fallback logic.
Assert the market-awareness sections remain referenced.
Keep the existing static asset checks passing.

description: Keep research-page HTML coverage for the market-awareness panels.
steps: Assert the research page still includes the market-awareness panel anchor.
Assert the evidence table anchor remains present.
Verify the page shell still loads under TestClient.

description: Add API coverage proving dashboard summary already contains enough research fallback data.
steps: Assert summary exposes strategy rows and candidate rows needed by the research page.
Assert embedded market-awareness remains present.
Keep the summary contract explicit.

description: Add coverage for research-page fallback behavior assumptions.
steps: Assert summary candidate rows carry fields the fallback renderer depends on.
Assert active strategy rows carry the fields needed by the active table renderer.
Document the dependency via tests rather than comments alone.

description: Restore focused API coverage for `/research/backtests`.
steps: Assert `GET /research/backtests` returns `200`.
Assert the list JSON parses after sanitization.
Keep the compare-path assertions passing when enough experiments exist.

description: Add narrow coverage for any new sanitization or fallback helpers introduced by the fix.
steps: Cover the helper at the layer it is implemented.
Keep the assertions focused on the new behavior.
Avoid broad unrelated fixture churn.

description: Protect the fallback candidate row shape used by research-page rendering.
steps: Assert fallback candidate rows expose the fields used by candidate cards/tables.
Keep the assertions resilient to irrelevant presentation changes.
Verify no undefined property access remains necessary on first paint.

description: Protect embedded market-awareness rendering assumptions for the research page.
steps: Assert the summary payload still embeds the market-awareness object.
Assert core market-awareness fields remain present.
Keep the research page fallback able to render from summary alone.

description: Verify the dashboard/trading-plan path remains unaffected by the research-page fix.
steps: Re-run the dashboard summary contract coverage.
Re-run the trading journal endpoint coverage relevant to market-awareness embedding.
Ensure the fix does not regress the main workflow.

description: Run focused pytest coverage for the repaired backtests endpoint and research-page assets.
steps: Run the focused API node for `test_research_backtest_endpoints`.
Run the page/static asset node covering `/dashboard/research`.
Record commands and results in `PROGRESS.md`.

description: Run focused pytest coverage for dashboard summary and facade fallbacks.
steps: Run the summary contract node.
Run the dashboard facade targeted file or nodes touched by fallback logic.
Record commands and results in `PROGRESS.md`.

description: Run local curl smoke for research-page dependencies after the fix.
steps: Verify `/dashboard/summary` returns quickly and contains research fallback data.
Verify `POST /research/scorecard/run` and `POST /research/candidates/scorecard` no longer prevent first paint expectations.
Record response status and timing evidence.

description: Run local HTML/API smoke for `/dashboard/research` after the fix.
steps: Verify the page shell loads.
Verify the expected market-awareness and research sections are still present.
Verify the page is no longer operationally blank under partial research endpoint failure.

description: Create the initial harness checkpoint commit for this bugfix task.
steps: Commit the new `PLAN.json`, `PROGRESS.md`, and `.harness` state files.
Leave all feature `passes` false at this stage.
Use the commit as the recovery point before implementation.

description: Create an implementation checkpoint after the first successful repair batch.
steps: Update `PLAN.json` pass flags for completed items.
Append the repair details and verification evidence to `PROGRESS.md`.
Commit the working fix as the next recovery point.

description: Run a final QA round using code/tests/curl evidence if browser automation is unavailable.
steps: Review the repaired loading flow against the spec and fallback contract.
Score whether the page now remains useful under partial endpoint failure.
Record the QA outcome in `.harness/qa-round-*.md` or `PROGRESS.md`.

description: If all features pass, mark the harness task complete and clean up state files.
steps: Append a completion note to `PROGRESS.md`.
Remove `PLAN.json`, `PROGRESS.md`, and forced-tracked `.harness` state files after all items are true.
Commit the cleanup checkpoint.

description: Report the fixed behavior, verification evidence, and any residual risks to the user.
steps: Summarize what changed and why the page was blank before.
List the concrete verification commands and outcomes.
Call out any remaining non-blocking risk if applicable.
